creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I have tried many different ways to try to reproduce the upgrade of glib 
2.22.4 to glib 2.24.1. I can't reproduce it. It's a rare problem. I think 
I can closed here and tell user to follow the workaround if we get another 
report. 

If one of you are able to figure how to reproduce it for us, feel free to 
open a new PR.
